entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Attack#0
entry.value: Feel ten thousand years of rage.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Attack#1
entry.value: In the name of the Dark Gods

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Attack#2
entry.value: Kneel before your lord!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Attack#3
entry.value: Die weaklings! Die scum!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Attack#4
entry.value: For the glory of Chaos!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Broken#0
entry.value: I will die not here!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Broken#1
entry.value: Back to the Eye!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Hurt#0
entry.value: What, you hurt ME?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Idle#0
entry.value: Whilst we stand idle, Imperials yet live.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Idle#1
entry.value: Do you remember? His blood stained every wall.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Idle#2
entry.value: Such joy, in seeing an angel fallen.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Idle#3
entry.value: Screams or songs, they are one to me.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Idle#4
entry.value: Was it worth it, the damnation?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Shaken#0
entry.value: WHO DARES?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Shaken#1
entry.value: I will lie to avenge this.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Victory#0
entry.value: I dedicate this death to the gods.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Victory#1
entry.value: Is that all? Dotards!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLord:Victory#2
entry.value: Victory is ash in my mouth whilst the Imperium stands.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosRhino:Attack#0
entry.value: What idiot sends us to war?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosRhino:Attack#1
entry.value: Grind their bones to dust.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosRhino:Attack#2
entry.value: Drive faster!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosRhino:Broken#0
entry.value: Flee! We'll kill them another day.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosRhino:Hurt#0
entry.value: Who's putting holes in our armour?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosRhino:Idle#0
entry.value: Who'd be a Rhino driver?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosRhino:Idle#1
entry.value: Driving the Lord to war, yawwwn.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosRhino:Shaken#0
entry.value: Damnation, for this?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosRhino:Victory#0
entry.value: You couldn't even beat a Rhino?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Attack#0
entry.value: Scream! Your doom is come!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Attack#1
entry.value: I am pure in my hatred. Come test it!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Attack#2
entry.value: I was the Emperor's son, you cannot stand against me!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Attack#3
entry.value: Hahahaha! DIE!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Broken#0
entry.value: We are unbound and undone, we must flee!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Hurt#0
entry.value: Dark Gods protect us.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Idle#0
entry.value: Can I stand another ten thousand years of this?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Idle#1
entry.value: Pass me another civilian. I'm out of ink.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Idle#2
entry.value: Why do they still shelter their corpse-Emperor?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Idle#3
entry.value: Endless war, endless joy.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Shaken#0
entry.value: We are... losing?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Victory#0
entry.value: So fall all enemies of Abaddon!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Victory#1
entry.value: Another step towards ruling this galaxy... our birthright.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Victory#2
entry.value: Your death is nothing to me.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpawn:Attack#0
entry.value: ...The widening gyre...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpawn:Idle#0
entry.value: ...an eternity of madness..?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpawn:Idle#2
entry.value: mmmm mmmm

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosSpawn:Idle#3
entry.value: ...slouching to bedlam...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Attack#0
entry.value: The warp touches you, little ones.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Attack#1
entry.value: Feel the power of a god-to-be!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Attack#2
entry.value: Playthings, puppets, fall!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Broken#0
entry.value: It can't be, defeated, by-

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Hurt#0
entry.value: YOU DARE CONTEND WITH ME

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Idle#0
entry.value: ...what fools these mortals be!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Idle#1
entry.value: The physical plane... I have missed it.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Idle#2
entry.value: Strange, a world that doesn't shift form at whim.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Idle#3
entry.value: What a strange doom sits on Gladius.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Idle#4
entry.value: Come, slaves. Entertain your god!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Idle#5
entry.value: Odd, to think that these talons were once mortal hands...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Shaken#0
entry.value: I tore the hearts from a thousand men... and this is how you thank me?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Shaken#1
entry.value: The warp is calling...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Shaken#2
entry.value: ...madness takes its toll—I must keep control.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Shaken#3
entry.value: I have my own special hell for those like you!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Victory#0
entry.value: Another skull for my collection... Khorne can beg.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Victory#1
entry.value: Heads without eyes... pleasing.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/DaemonPrince:Victory#2
entry.value: Hold still, mortal— I want to enjoy your death.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Attack#0
entry.value: Yes, yes, die mortals, die die.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Attack#1
entry.value: Closer, claws, calling, come!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Attack#2
entry.value: Meet our gods, go meet our gods.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Attack#3
entry.value: For Chaos, blood, skulls, for Chaos.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Attack#4
entry.value: Tear and rend... mortality is joy.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Attack#5
entry.value: Flense, cut, smash, joy, shred!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Broken#0
entry.value: Dark gods!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Broken#1
entry.value: Losing, losing, hahaha, losing!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Hurt#0
entry.value: Yes, back to the warp, yes, free us.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Hurt#1
entry.value: Smash my cage, free daemon-I

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Idle#0
entry.value: Warp, where, warp gone!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Idle#1
entry.value: Mustn't kill, runebound, sorcery. Mustn't... want to.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Idle#2
entry.value: Why not kill, kill, kill, where kill?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Idle#3
entry.value: Old ones stink here. Stink dead gods, stink.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Shaken#0
entry.value: Haha, warp is calling, freeeee.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Victory#0
entry.value: Break so easily, snap, sad, more?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Victory#1
entry.value: Dead so soon.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Victory#2
entry.value: To the warp, to the masters' glory.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Defiler:Victory#3
entry.value: Little soul. Forge is hot, burning, waiting. For you.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Attack#1
entry.value: SHOOT BACK COWARDS

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Attack#2
entry.value: One bolt, two bolts, three bolts, four-

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Attack#3
entry.value: For the glory of Chaos! For the Dark Mechanicum! For the joy of shooting!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Attack#4
entry.value: From hell, we fire!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Hurt#0
entry.value: Not dead, keep shooting.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Idle#0
entry.value: When you talk with guns, people listen. When you talk to guns, people run.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Idle#1
entry.value: My blood is plasma.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Idle#2
entry.value: Bless the Warp, that gives us such plenty.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Shaken#0
entry.value: Our guns, not yours. From our cold dead fingers...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Havoc:Victory#0
entry.value: Shot into peace.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Heldrake:Hurt#0
entry.value: Arkh! Arkh!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Heldrake:Idle#0
entry.value: Man... once.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#0
entry.value: Blood for the Blood God!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#1
entry.value: Khorne wants your skull.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#2
entry.value: My axe longs to taste your blood!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#3
entry.value: Stand and fight, cowards!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#4
entry.value: There is no honor in a warrior's death!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Broken#0
entry.value: Khorne will doom us!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Hurt#0
entry.value: My... My blood for the Blood GOD!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Idle#0
entry.value: WHY DO WE NOT FIGHT?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Shaken#0
entry.value: We will not die easily!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Victory#1
entry.value: KHORNE CALLS YOU

entry.name: ChaosGuard/KhorneBerzerker:Victory#2
entry.value: ALL ARE SKULLS

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Attack#0
entry.value: By your true name, I compel you.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Attack#1
entry.value: Wherefore your fear? A breach is near.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Attack#2
entry.value: My stave hungers, your soul lingers.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Broken#0
entry.value: What lives but will not die?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Hurt#0
entry.value: Is this my bone? Fie, I see it none.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Idle#0
entry.value: Useless men and ghosts... we need better hosts.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Idle#1
entry.value: Soon the athame, then Fatewalker's true name...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Idle#2
entry.value: Possession is nine tenths of the lore...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Idle#3
entry.value: They will taste the planet's heart, before our time is done.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Shaken#0
entry.value: What is fear, the mindkiller?

entry.name: ChaosGuard/MasterOfPossession:Victory#0
entry.value: My demons whisper, each to each. They will whisper to you.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Attack#0
entry.value: Target diagnostic: you... are not perfect.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Attack#1
entry.value: Cogitators, mechatendrils, armaments: deployed.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Attack#2
entry.value: GOTO target elimination. Execute.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Broken#0
entry.value: Damage limitation programme initiate.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Hurt#0
entry.value: Diagnostic: organical/mechanic ERROR

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Idle#0
entry.value: Ridiculous Warsmiths. Ridiculous!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Idle#1
entry.value: Man, machine, daemon—together, perfection.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Idle#2
entry.value: Dear mechatendrils...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Idle#3
entry.value: Error: emotional core recovery. Delete.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Idle#4
entry.value: Soul Forge, gods, we are your weapons.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Shaken#0
entry.value: Reports: damage sustained.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/Warpsmith:Victory#0
entry.value: Assessment: opposition deactivated. Predictable.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLandRaider:Attack#0
entry.value: They seek death at our hands.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLandRaider:Attack#1
entry.value: Crush their skulls 'neath our treads!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLandRaider:Attack#2
entry.value: They seek death at our hands.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLandRaider:Broken#0
entry.value: The Dark Gods will damn us for this...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLandRaider:Hurt#0
entry.value: We will not die here, weaklings!

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLandRaider:Idle#0
entry.value: Holding up pretty well for ten thousand years without a service.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLandRaider:Idle#1
entry.value: Dark gods preserve us.

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLandRaider:Shaken#0
entry.value: Save yourselves...

entry.name: ChaosGuard/ChaosLandRaider:Victory#0
entry.value: They're dead. Predictable.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Attack#0
entry.value: Feel ten thousand years of rage.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Attack#1
entry.value: In the name of the Dark Gods

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Attack#2
entry.value: Kneel before your lord!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Attack#3
entry.value: Die weaklings! Die scum!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Attack#4
entry.value: For the glory of Chaos!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Broken#0
entry.value: I will die not here!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Broken#1
entry.value: Back to the Eye!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Hurt#0
entry.value: What, you hurt ME?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Idle#0
entry.value: Whilst we stand idle, Imperials yet live.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Idle#1
entry.value: Do you remember? His blood stained every wall.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Idle#2
entry.value: Such joy, in seeing an angel fallen.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Idle#3
entry.value: Screams or songs, they are one to me.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Idle#4
entry.value: Was it worth it, the damnation?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Shaken#0
entry.value: WHO DARES?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Shaken#1
entry.value: I will lie to avenge this.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Victory#0
entry.value: I dedicate this death to the gods.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Victory#1
entry.value: Is that all? Dotards!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLord:Victory#2
entry.value: Victory is ash in my mouth whilst the Imperium stands.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosRhino:Attack#0
entry.value: What idiot sends us to war?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosRhino:Attack#1
entry.value: Grind their bones to dust.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosRhino:Attack#2
entry.value: Drive faster!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosRhino:Broken#0
entry.value: Flee! We'll kill them another day.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosRhino:Hurt#0
entry.value: Who's putting holes in our armour?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosRhino:Idle#0
entry.value: Who'd be a Rhino driver?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosRhino:Idle#1
entry.value: Driving the Lord to war, yawwwn.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosRhino:Shaken#0
entry.value: Damnation, for this?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosRhino:Victory#0
entry.value: You couldn't even beat a Rhino?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Attack#0
entry.value: Scream! Your doom is come!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Attack#1
entry.value: I am pure in my hatred. Come test it!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Attack#2
entry.value: I was the Emperor's son, you cannot stand against me!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Attack#3
entry.value: Hahahaha! DIE!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Broken#0
entry.value: We are unbound and undone, we must flee!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Hurt#0
entry.value: Dark Gods protect us.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Idle#0
entry.value: Can I stand another ten thousand years of this?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Idle#1
entry.value: Pass me another civilian. I'm out of ink.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Idle#2
entry.value: Why do they still shelter their corpse-Emperor?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Idle#3
entry.value: Endless war, endless joy.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Shaken#0
entry.value: We are... losing?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Victory#0
entry.value: So fall all enemies of Abaddon!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Victory#1
entry.value: Another step towards ruling this galaxy... our birthright.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpaceMarine:Victory#2
entry.value: Your death is nothing to me.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpawn:Attack#0
entry.value: ...The widening gyre...

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpawn:Idle#0
entry.value: ...an eternity of madness..?

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpawn:Idle#2
entry.value: mmmm mmmm

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosSpawn:Idle#3
entry.value: ...slouching to bedlam...

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Attack#0
entry.value: The warp touches you, little ones.

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Attack#1
entry.value: Feel the power of a god-to-be!

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Attack#2
entry.value: Playthings, puppets, fall!

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Broken#0
entry.value: It can't be, defeated, by-

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Hurt#0
entry.value: YOU DARE CONTEND WITH ME

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Idle#0
entry.value: ...what fools these mortals be!

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Idle#1
entry.value: The physical plane... I have missed it.

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Idle#2
entry.value: Strange, a world that doesn't shift form at whim.

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Idle#3
entry.value: What a strange doom sits on Gladius.

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Idle#4
entry.value: Come, slaves. Entertain your god!

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Idle#5
entry.value: Odd, to think that these talons were once mortal hands...

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Shaken#0
entry.value: I tore the hearts from a thousand men... and this is how you thank me?

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Shaken#1
entry.value: The warp is calling...

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Shaken#2
entry.value: ...madness takes its toll—I must keep control.

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Shaken#3
entry.value: I have my own special hell for those like you!

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Victory#0
entry.value: Another skull for my collection... Khorne can beg.

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Victory#1
entry.value: Heads without eyes... pleasing.

entry.name: traitorguard/DaemonPrince:Victory#2
entry.value: Hold still, mortal— I want to enjoy your death.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Attack#0
entry.value: Yes, yes, die mortals, die die.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Attack#1
entry.value: Closer, claws, calling, come!

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Attack#2
entry.value: Meet our gods, go meet our gods.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Attack#3
entry.value: For Chaos, blood, skulls, for Chaos.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Attack#4
entry.value: Tear and rend... mortality is joy.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Attack#5
entry.value: Flense, cut, smash, joy, shred!

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Broken#0
entry.value: Dark gods!

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Broken#1
entry.value: Losing, losing, hahaha, losing!

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Hurt#0
entry.value: Yes, back to the warp, yes, free us.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Hurt#1
entry.value: Smash my cage, free daemon-I

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Idle#0
entry.value: Warp, where, warp gone!

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Idle#1
entry.value: Mustn't kill, runebound, sorcery. Mustn't... want to.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Idle#2
entry.value: Why not kill, kill, kill, where kill?

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Idle#3
entry.value: Old ones stink here. Stink dead gods, stink.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Shaken#0
entry.value: Haha, warp is calling, freeeee.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Victory#0
entry.value: Break so easily, snap, sad, more?

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Victory#1
entry.value: Dead so soon.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Victory#2
entry.value: To the warp, to the masters' glory.

entry.name: traitorguard/Defiler:Victory#3
entry.value: Little soul. Forge is hot, burning, waiting. For you.

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Attack#1
entry.value: SHOOT BACK COWARDS

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Attack#2
entry.value: One bolt, two bolts, three bolts, four-

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Attack#3
entry.value: For the glory of Chaos! For the Dark Mechanicum! For the joy of shooting!

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Attack#4
entry.value: From hell, we fire!

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Hurt#0
entry.value: Not dead, keep shooting.

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Idle#0
entry.value: When you talk with guns, people listen. When you talk to guns, people run.

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Idle#1
entry.value: My blood is plasma.

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Idle#2
entry.value: Bless the Warp, that gives us such plenty.

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Shaken#0
entry.value: Our guns, not yours. From our cold dead fingers...

entry.name: traitorguard/Havoc:Victory#0
entry.value: Shot into peace.

entry.name: traitorguard/Heldrake:Hurt#0
entry.value: Arkh! Arkh!

entry.name: traitorguard/Heldrake:Idle#0
entry.value: Man... once.

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#0
entry.value: Blood for the Blood God!

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#1
entry.value: Khorne wants your skull.

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#2
entry.value: My axe longs to taste your blood!

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#3
entry.value: Stand and fight, cowards!

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Attack#4
entry.value: There is no honor in a warrior's death!

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Broken#0
entry.value: Khorne will doom us!

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Hurt#0
entry.value: My... My blood for the Blood GOD!

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Idle#0
entry.value: WHY DO WE NOT FIGHT?

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Shaken#0
entry.value: We will not die easily!

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Victory#1
entry.value: KHORNE CALLS YOU

entry.name: traitorguard/KhorneBerzerker:Victory#2
entry.value: ALL ARE SKULLS

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Attack#0
entry.value: By your true name, I compel you.

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Attack#1
entry.value: Wherefore your fear? A breach is near.

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Attack#2
entry.value: My stave hungers, your soul lingers.

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Broken#0
entry.value: What lives but will not die?

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Hurt#0
entry.value: Is this my bone? Fie, I see it none.

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Idle#0
entry.value: Useless men and ghosts... we need better hosts.

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Idle#1
entry.value: Soon the athame, then Fatewalker's true name...

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Idle#2
entry.value: Possession is nine tenths of the lore...

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Idle#3
entry.value: They will taste the planet's heart, before our time is done.

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Shaken#0
entry.value: What is fear, the mindkiller?

entry.name: traitorguard/MasterOfPossession:Victory#0
entry.value: My demons whisper, each to each. They will whisper to you.

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Attack#0
entry.value: Target diagnostic: you... are not perfect.

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Attack#1
entry.value: Cogitators, mechatendrils, armaments: deployed.

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Attack#2
entry.value: GOTO target elimination. Execute.

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Broken#0
entry.value: Damage limitation programme initiate.

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Hurt#0
entry.value: Diagnostic: organical/mechanic ERROR

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Idle#0
entry.value: Ridiculous Warsmiths. Ridiculous!

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Idle#1
entry.value: Man, machine, daemon—together, perfection.

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Idle#2
entry.value: Dear mechatendrils...

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Idle#3
entry.value: Error: emotional core recovery. Delete.

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Idle#4
entry.value: Soul Forge, gods, we are your weapons.

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Shaken#0
entry.value: Reports: damage sustained.

entry.name: traitorguard/Warpsmith:Victory#0
entry.value: Assessment: opposition deactivated. Predictable.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLandRaider:Attack#0
entry.value: They seek death at our hands.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLandRaider:Attack#1
entry.value: Crush their skulls 'neath our treads!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLandRaider:Attack#2
entry.value: They seek death at our hands.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLandRaider:Broken#0
entry.value: The Dark Gods will damn us for this...

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLandRaider:Hurt#0
entry.value: We will not die here, weaklings!

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLandRaider:Idle#0
entry.value: Holding up pretty well for ten thousand years without a service.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLandRaider:Idle#1
entry.value: Dark gods preserve us.

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLandRaider:Shaken#0
entry.value: Save yourselves...

entry.name: traitorguard/ChaosLandRaider:Victory#0
entry.value: They're dead. Predictable.
